subject: LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-AUDIT-V1 PASS — Uniton_Shared_Live audit complete; sync broken + 3 gaps + Option B recommended

top_3_gaps_for_NTS.gap: Sync workflow has not run since 2026-04-28T19:33Z. 28+ qualifying pushes on 2026-04-29 (heartbeat fix, Canon V1.1, BLOCH spec, L1 ingest) did NOT trigger sync.
top_3_gaps_for_NTS.root_cause_hypothesis: GitHub Actions default GITHUB_TOKEN cannot trigger downstream workflows on push (anti-loop). auto_project_status + heartbeat workflows commit using default token → sync downstream blocked. Recent PR merges happened but their diffs touched docs/scripts (NOT in sync paths-filter), so they don't trigger sync either.
top_3_gaps_for_NTS.what_NTS_needs_to_know: Public mirror is ~14h stale right now. CLA fetching tier-1 URLs gets outdated state. Needs trigger fix + manual workflow_dispatch to resync.

top_3_gaps_for_NTS.gap: No task-log surface synced. /reports/, /audit_logs/, /snapshots/, /handoffs/ are NOT in sync whitelist.
top_3_gaps_for_NTS.what_NTS_needs_to_know: Your vision 'every task done → live log' is currently NOT achievable through Live mirror. Task artifacts are private to Uniton_Shared.

top_3_gaps_for_NTS.gap: No AIER status / decision ledger / deploy state surfaces. UDNA marker, heartbeat ledger, NTS_DECISION packets, Vercel deploy state — none reachable via Live mirror.
top_3_gaps_for_NTS.what_NTS_needs_to_know: Live Ledger needs new top-level namespaces (aier-status/, ledger/, status/) for these surfaces to become public-fetchable.

options_considered.A_keep_augment: Add task-log surfaces to existing whitelist + fix trigger. ~1 day. Simplest but whitelist gets long.
options_considered.B_migrate_RECOMMENDED: Keep runtime/ block. Add tasks/, ledger/, status/, aier-status/ namespaces. Fix trigger. ~3 days. Maps NTS vision; preserves URLs.
options_considered.C_redesign: Wipe Live mirror, build greenfield. ~5 days. Breaks tier-1 URL_REGISTRY contracts.

claco_recommendation.rationale: 7-file runtime/ mirror works architecturally (only sync trigger is broken). NTS vision adds layers, not replaces. Option B keeps runtime/* URLs stable + adds new namespaces matching natural growth pattern. Each top-level dir = one concern.

claco_critique_overkill: tasks/active/ folder — replace with single tasks/active.live.md roll-up
aier-status/aier-ops/ — cross-AIER goes through Bridge, not file mirror

critical_fix_required_regardless_of_opti.title: Chained-workflow trigger fix
critical_fix_required_regardless_of_opti.why: Without this, no sync ever fires from auto-regen pushes regardless of structure choice
options: Use PAT (Personal Access Token) for auto_project_status push instead of default GITHUB_TOKEN
Use repository_dispatch event chain (auto_project_status fires → sync listens)
Add workflow_run trigger to sync (listens for auto_project_status completion)

deliverables.audit_report: reports/LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-AUDIT-V1_REPORT.md (15 sections, the main read for NTS)

acceptance_criteria_status: 14/16 PASS · AC6 partial (skipped per spec time-box, characterized via Phase C) · AC14 closes after self-merge
boundary_compliance: 9/9 PASS — 0 modify Uniton_Shared_Live (read-only) · 0 modify Uniton_OS · 0 modify code in Uniton_Shared · [vercel skip] · LANE01- DOT format · NTS clicks 0

2. NTS chooses Option A/B/C (recommend B with proposed structure)

6. CLA authors LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-EMIT-AUTOMATION task — task-emit hooks in every task workflow
7. CLAC-1 + Cursor integrate emit hooks (Uniton_Shared + Uniton_OS pipelines)
